notes:
✨ Call & Chat Improvements

  • Declined calls: When someone rejects your call, you now see a clear "Declined" indicator — no more guessing.
  • Camera on join: Camera and microphone now activate reliably when accepting a 1-to-1 call.
  • Talk to Jester: Click "Talk" next to Jester in the sidebar for an instant AI conversation — no ringing, just start talking.
  • Instant leave: Leaving a call now feels immediate — the lobby appears right away while cleanup happens in the background.
  • Link previews: Chat link thumbnails stay dismissed — they no longer reappear when rejoining a call.
  • Image viewer: The close button on image previews now works correctly.
  • Nudge offline users: You can now send a nudge even when a teammate is offline.
  • Join room from sidebar: When a teammate is in a group room, the button now shows "Join" instead of "Call".
